text:
France beat Argentina in soccer at the 2024 Summer Olympics on Friday night, but things got ugly after the final whistle.

After the French scored a 1â0 victory in the quarterfinals, a brawl broke out between the teams near the middle of the field. It drifted towards the touchline as staff and security attempted to break things up.

Video is below.

pic.twitter.com/ytWVPwyE4t

There was no love lost between the two sides throughout the match, as was seen in this interaction between LoÃ¯c BadÃ© and Lucas BeltrÃ¡n.

France's LoÃ¯c BadÃ© was HYPED after muscling Argentina's Lucas BeltrÃ¡n off the ball ð¤pic.twitter.com/pZezn4EP7T

The animosity between thetwo national teamshas been boiling for a long time. They faced off in an absolute classic during the 2022 World Cup final, but things got much more contentious last month. After Argentina won Copa AmÃ©rica, avideo of its players singing an offensive songabout French players of African heritage surfaced. Though this tournament features the countries' Under-23 teams, it's clear the tension was heightened entering the match.

France got a fifth minute goal from Jean-Philippe Mateta and it managed to hold the 1â0 lead throughout the rest of the match, even with more than 10 minutes of added time in the second half.

The French will move on to face Egypt in one semifinal, while Morocco and Spain will do battle in the other.

title: Argentina, France Brawl After Olympic Soccer Match
description: An ugly incident broke out after France's 1â0 win in the quarterfinals.
